creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #17)

I've not had access to a powerpc64 or powerpc since
before my comment #16 and likely will not for weeks
or months.

[I do occasionally amd64 -> powerpc* cross-build but
this report was tied to run-time behavior.]

So, while I expect the problem is fixed, I'm not a
source of reasonable direct-evidence at this point.
